heading: GitHub Actions CI/CD Pipeline
body: The CI/CD pipeline has two jobs. The `lint-and-test` job runs all quality checks in sequence: installs Python and Node.js dependencies, runs flake8 on the backend, runs ESLint on the frontend, performs TypeScript type checking with `tsc --noEmit`, seeds the database to validate JSON data integrity, and builds the Next.js frontend. The `docker-build` job (which depends on lint-and-test) builds Docker images, starts the containers, and polls the health endpoint for up to 60 seconds to verify everything works.
